name: Bid Wall Absorption (High Volatility Filter)
hypothesis: The parent spec identifies rare moments where a large bid wall is being absorbed by aggressive selling. This signal should be purer during high-volatility regimes where such patterns are more meaningful. Adding a realized volatility filter will test if we can isolate a near-perfect subset of these events.
mutation_note: Following feedback to `add_filter`, a volatility regime condition (`rolling_realized_vol > 40`) was added to the parent's logic to improve signal purity, even at the cost of trade frequency.
